name: starter-vocab
description: A phrasebook starter. Common words to copy into your pack's vocab so you don't begin from a blank file. This is DATA to adapt, not a fixed list — rename, add, and drop to match how YOUR people actually talk.
note: agg maps a word to the kind of answer (mean/median/sum/count/max/min). metric_hints suggests the field-kind a business word usually points at — use it to shape your record_schema and your vocab.metric. stop lists filler words to ignore. Validate your finished pack against packs/pack.schema.json.
